name: Ravivar
vrat: the Ravivar vrat, for health, vitality and clarity

name: Somvar
vrat: the Somvar vrat, for peace and the granting of wishes

name: Mangalvar
vrat: the Mangalvar vrat, for courage, strength and protection

name: Budhvar
vrat: the Budhvar vrat, for intellect and good fortune

name: Guruvar
vrat: the Guruvar vrat, for wisdom, learning and prosperity

name: Shukravar
vrat: the Shukravar vrat, for abundance, love and beauty

name: Shanivar
vrat: the Shanivar vrat, for relief from hardship and karmic weight
